# SEO Leeds

> SEO Leeds is a local search marketing consultancy run by Sunny Patel, serving Leeds and West Yorkshire businesses with technical SEO, AI search optimisation, and data-driven growth strategies.

## Pages

- [Home](https://seo-leeds.uk/): SEO consultant in Leeds offering local search marketing for Yorkshire businesses
- [Services](https://seo-leeds.uk/services/): Full range of SEO services including technical SEO, content, local SEO, and AI search optimisation
- [Areas](https://seo-leeds.uk/areas/): SEO coverage across Leeds suburbs, West Yorkshire towns, and the Northern Powerhouse region
- [Industries](https://seo-leeds.uk/industries/): Industry-specific SEO for financial services, legal, digital, healthcare, and retail in Leeds
- [Technical SEO Leeds](https://seo-leeds.uk/technical-seo-leeds/): Technical SEO services for Leeds businesses including site speed, crawlability, and Core Web Vitals
- [SEO Audit Leeds](https://seo-leeds.uk/seo-audit-leeds/): Comprehensive paid SEO audit service for Leeds and West Yorkshire businesses
- [Free SEO Audit Leeds](https://seo-leeds.uk/free-seo-audit-leeds/): Complimentary SEO health check for Leeds businesses
- [SEO Pricing Leeds](https://seo-leeds.uk/seo-pricing-leeds/): Transparent SEO pricing with tiered packages, Leeds vs London cost comparison
- [AI Search Optimisation Leeds](https://seo-leeds.uk/ai-search-optimisation-leeds/): AI search optimisation covering ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Copilot, AI Overviews, and LLM SEO
- [Case Studies](https://seo-leeds.uk/case-studies/): SEO case studies from Leeds businesses including law firms and local restaurants
- [About](https://seo-leeds.uk/about/): About Sunny Patel, SEO consultant serving Leeds and West Yorkshire
- [Contact](https://seo-leeds.uk/contact/): Get in touch for SEO services in Leeds
